-1.event_info: Initial trigger for sending social recommendations

-2.event_info: Initial trigger for sending algorithm recommendations

1.event_info: Event to send recommendations from UserAgents to their followers UserAgents through social networks

fields.name: sender_id
fields.description: The unique identifier of the user agent sending the recommendations.

fields.name: receiver_id
fields.description: The unique identifier of the follower, the user agent receiving the recommendations.

fields.name: recommendations
fields.description: Dictionary of blog content pushed by social network.

2.event_info: Event to send recommendations from RecommenderAgents to all UserAgents through recommendation algorithm

fields.name: sender_id
fields.description: The unique identifier of the recommender agent sending the recommendations.

fields.name: receiver_id
fields.description: The unique identifier of the user agent receiving the recommendations.

fields.name: recommendations
fields.description: Dictionary of blog content pushed by recommendation algorithm.

3.event_info: Event to terminate the simulation after UserAgents spreading recommendations

fields.name: user_id
fields.description: The unique identifier of the user receiving the recommendations.

fields.name: repost_id
fields.description: The unique identifier of the repost replying to the blog being recommended.

fields.name: blog_id
fields.description: The unique identifier of the blog being recommended and has been replied to.

fields.name: repost_content
fields.description: The content of the repost replying to the blog being recommended.

fields.name: blog_id
fields.description: The unique identifier of the blog being mentioned.

fields.name: repost_id
fields.description: The unique identifier of the repost being mentioned.

fields.name: repost_content
fields.description: The content of the repost being mentioned.

fields.name: mentioner_id
fields.description: The unique identifier of the user mentioning the current user.

fields.name: mentioner_nickname
fields.description: The nickname of the user mentioning the current user.

fields.name: mention_type
fields.description: The type of the mention. Can be 'at', 'reply'.

5.event_info: Event sent when a user replies to a mention, triggering another mention notification to the mentioned user

fields.name: blog_id
fields.description: The unique identifier of the blog being mentioned.

fields.name: repost_id
fields.description: The unique identifier of the repost being mentioned.

fields.name: repost_content
fields.description: The content of the repost being mentioned.

fields.name: mentioner_id
fields.description: The unique identifier of the user mentioning the current user.

fields.name: mentioner_nickname
fields.description: The nickname of the user mentioning the current user.

fields.name: mention_type
fields.description: The type of the mention. Can be 'at', 'reply'.

6.event_info: Event to terminate the simulation after UserAgents spreading mentions

fields.name: user_id
fields.description: The unique identifier of the user replying to the mention.

fields.name: repost_id
fields.description: The unique identifier of the repost replying to the mention.

fields.name: blog_id
fields.description: The unique identifier of the blog being replied to.

fields.name: repost_content
fields.description: The content of the repost replying to the mention.
